select_when: Legacy assumptions or offerings still function by inertia even though the surrounding conditions have changed materially.
Meaningful reinvention requires abandoning sunk-cost logic before better options become visible.
Innovation requires disciplined replacement of obsolete logic, not just incremental polishing.
The team needs to destroy wrong ideas early so it can build a more truthful and executable alternative.
avoid_when: Destruction has become novelty theater without evidence that the replacement is more truthful, useful, or executable.
The organization is celebrating boldness while ignoring the human and implementation system needed for the new design to work.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model on disciplined replacement of obsolete logic and explicit reinvention pressure rather than on disruption theater.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 4 or import donor-shaped higher-order semantics in this coverage batch.
Kept the routing surface conservative so Layer 2B stays canonical and Waves 2 to 4 stay preview-only.
open_questions: Wave 4 candidacy stays observational only for this batch.

select_when.note: Select conditions stay close to the source activation language and are compressed only enough for routing use.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions preserve the source anti-patterns and misuse warnings with conservative normalization.

input_type.note: The typed input label is a reviewed routing compression of the source context.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention shape implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning taxonomy labels are normalized onto the existing Layer 2B vocabulary.
